/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++14 -march=native -O3 -ggdb -Wall -Wextra -Wno-missing-braces -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/next_geq.dir/next_geq.cpp.o -o ../next_geq  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_iostreams.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_unit_test_framework.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_log_setup.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_date_time.so.1.74.0 ../external/FastPFor/libFastPFor_lib.a ../external/libstreamvbyte.a ../external/libMaskedVByte.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_log.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_chrono.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_regex.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.74.0
